'''Parwan nutricake''' was a spiced food. [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] was fond of the dish.<ref name="band">{{StoryCite|story=And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref> It was a healthy and bread-like dessert.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Parwan Nutricake}}</ref>

{{Food-stub}}
